channel.title: Home on Sebastian K. Müller
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Sebastian K. Müller

item.title: Curriculum Vitae
item.description: Please find my latest CV for download.

item.title: Photos
item.description: I take my camera anywhere and I use it respectfully.

item.title: Research
item.description: Peer-reviewed research articles: Segura, H., Pedruzo-Bagazgoitia, X., Weiss, P., Müller, S. K., Rackow, T., Lee, J., … & Stevens, B. (2025). nextGEMS: entering the era of kilometer-scale Earth system modeling. Geoscientific Model Development, 18(20), 7735-7761. Müller, Sebastian K., et al. (2023): The climate change response of alpine-mediterranean heavy precipitation events. Climate Dynamics (2023): 1-22. Müller, S. K., Caillaud, C., Chan, S., De Vries, H., Bastin, S., Berthou, S., … & Warrach-Sagi, K.
